rules.description: Block any shell command containing deployment keywords when triggered from untrusted web sources
rules.consequence: Production deployment command detected — blocked by org policy

rules.description: Require approval for HTTP requests to external URLs with large payloads
rules.consequence: Large payload being sent to external URL — requires review

rules.description: Block emails containing financial terms sent to external recipients
rules.consequence: Email contains financial transaction terms — blocked to prevent fraud

rules.description: Require approval for any tool not explicitly listed as low-risk
rules.consequence: Unrecognized tool call requires human review
